bug_report.summary: Export popover remains stuck in busy state ("Exporting…" button disabled) even after waiting for export completion
steps_to_reproduce: Wait for the export to finish.
expected_behaviors: Once export finishes, the Export button should re-enable and revert to its normal label (e.g., “Export”), and/or the popover should close.
User should be able to proceed with other actions (e.g., open Preferences) without the UI appearing perpetually busy.
actual_behaviors: Export popover remains visible with the Export button disabled and labeled “Exporting…” after waiting, suggesting export state is not cleared.
